cards.prompt: Name five methods of developing an overall capitalization rate (RO).

band of investment (mortgage and equity): band of investment: mortgage and equity components
band of investment mortgage and equity
band of investment (land and improvement: band of investment: land and building components
band of investment land and building

cards.prompt: The summation method of estimating an overall yield rate (YO) is a theoretical method based on the sum of four components. Name them.
When developing the overall capitalization rate from market comparisons, three critical items must be highly comparable between comparable sales and the subject property. Name them.
Another name for the mortgage capitalization rate (RM) is the ___.

The ___ technique computes a weighted average of the mortgage capitalization rate (RM) and equity capitalization rate (RE). The resulting weighted average is called the overall capitalization rate (RO).
accept: band of investment: mortgage and equity
band of investment mortgage and equity

cards.prompt: The capitalization rate method most often used by lending institutions is the ___ method.
The ___ is the percentage that annual real estate taxes are in relation to total property value.
Name the two methods of developing an effective tax rate.
The net income ratio method can be used to develop an overall capitalization rate when the net income ratio is divided by the ___.
What are the three components of an overall capitalization rate?
The ___ for developing an overall capitalization rate is appropriate when the effective gross income multiplier is known.
The ___ reflects the relationship between the land income and land value.
The weighted average of the land capitalization rate and the building capitalization rate is known as the ___.
cards.note: The chapter text specifically calls this the 'overall unloaded capitalization rate' when no ETR is included (see loaded vs. unloaded rate distinction) - both forms are correct.

cards.prompt: Dividing the building (improvement) income by the ___ will result in the building (improvement) value.
The assessment level is 30% of appraised value and the current tax rate is $8.50 per hundred. What is the effective tax rate expressed as a decimal and as a percentage (rounded)?
